essence: Designs and oversees drainage systems to manage surface water and prevent flooding on construction projects.

identity.title: Drainage Engineer
identity.summary: Plans drainage layouts, specifies materials, and supervises installation to ensure effective water management and compliance.

salary.notes: Engineers with flood risk and sustainable drainage expertise are in demand.

qualifications: Degree or HND in civil engineering or related field
Experience with drainage design and SuDS principles
Familiarity with CAD and hydraulic modelling tools
Knowledge of regulations and site supervision

lifestyle.description: Office and site balance with design work, site visits, and coordination with contractors and planners.

habits: Coordinates with planners and environmental teams
